items.name: Chevron Flow
limitations: PPTX conversion may rebuild chevrons as native shapes.

items.name: Swimlane
limitations: Dense tables require overflow checks.

items.name: Ratio Donut
limitations: Validate SVG or native chart conversion for PPTX.

items.name: Competency Columns
limitations: Long content requires column overflow checks.

items.name: SUN.STUDIO Logo
limitations: Use according to SUN.STUDIO brand and licensing rules.

items.name: Dio Character
limitations: Use selectively on title, section, and closing slides.

items.name: XO Pattern
limitations: Use a background-only PNG when CSS or masking cannot round-trip.

items.name: Guideline Card Variants
limitations: Gradient card fills and embedded icon artwork should use SVG or PNG fallback when native export changes appearance.
Source copy is represented by editable content fields rather than reused verbatim.
Text overflow is intentionally unmanaged; callers may edit content, font size, and bounds.

items.name: Guideline Board Layouts
limitations: Radial labels require position metadata when instantiated; the staged contract does not hard-code source wording.
Text overflow is intentionally unmanaged; callers may edit content, font size, and bounds.

items.name: Guideline Icon Library
limitations: The approved region is the full page, so the exact SVG is a page-level icon sheet rather than individually cropped icon files.
Individual icon publication requires explicit per-icon bounds or source object IDs.
The source SVG contains 880 paths; preserve its viewBox when scaling.
Text overflow is intentionally unmanaged; callers may edit content, font size, and bounds.

items.name: Guideline Image Layouts
limitations: Photos remain independent cropped image objects; text and card labels remain editable.
Circular and rounded image masks may require transparent PNG fallback if the target exporter changes clipping.
Text overflow is intentionally unmanaged; callers may edit content, font size, and bounds.

items.name: Guideline Shape Variants
limitations: Layered halo and blended gradient treatments may require raster or SVG fallback in PPTX and Canva.
Editable labels must stay outside raster fallback layers.
Text overflow is intentionally unmanaged; callers may edit content, font size, and bounds.

items.name: Title Cover Template
limitations: Layout contract only; no source copy reused.
Composes sun.background.orange-pinstripe, sun.asset.logo, sun.component.header-tag.

items.name: Orange Pinstripe Background
limitations: Layered gradients may not round-trip in PPTX/Canva; use PNG fallback.
Color tokens are approximate; reconcile with canonical design system.

items.name: Orange Arcs Background
limitations: Repeating radial gradient may not round-trip in PPTX/Canva; use PNG fallback.

items.name: Blue Arcs Background
limitations: Repeating radial gradient may not round-trip in PPTX/Canva; use PNG fallback.
Cool-tone sibling of sun.background.orange-arcs (shared geometry).

items.name: Quote Mark Icon
limitations: Decorative glyph; path is a clean reconstruction, not a font glyph.

items.name: Prompt Questions
limitations: Preview uses placeholder copy; source wording stored in evidence only.

items.name: Arrow Up-Right Icon
limitations: Recurs on slides 3 and 5; color via currentColor.

items.name: Numbered Heading
limitations: Preview uses placeholder copy; source wording stored in evidence only.

items.name: Header Tag
limitations: Four variants observed across slides 1-5; verify the full deck for more.
